summary:
The mid-systolic murmur may indicate aortic insufficiency or another valvular dysfunction influenced by diastolic filling time. Standing reduces venous return, leading to decreasedpreload and shortened diastolic filling, which can modulate murmur characteristics—making this the most clinically supported physiological response among the choices.  

\boxed{D}
